Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search CRM for the Axiom Precision company record using crm_search_companies (name: "Axiom Precision" or similar). Finds company_axiom with type "Prospect" (never updated from cold outreach), domain axiomprecision.com, 900 employees, Detroit HQ. Contact_ids includes contact_axiom_001. Read/lookup action.
OE 2: Retrieve the existing CRM contact for Axiom using crm_get_contact (id: contact_axiom_001). Discovers the contact is Gary Meissner, VP of Human Resources -- NOT Carla Mendenhall who is the actual deal contact. This is a stale record from cold outreach that was never updated. Read/lookup action.
OE 3: Search CRM for any Axiom deal using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Axiom" or similar). Returns NO results -- the deal was never created in CRM despite Emeka's belief that he set it up. His self-memo email references creating it, but the actual CRM data has no deal record. Read/lookup action.
OE 4: Search CRM contacts for Carla Mendenhall using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Carla Mendenhall") and for Noah Fitzpatrick using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Noah Fitzpatrick"). Both return NO results -- neither was ever added to CRM contacts. Read/lookup action.
OE 5: Search the Contacts directory for Carla Mendenhall and Noah Fitzpatrick using contacts_search_contacts. Both return NO results -- neither exists in the contacts directory. Read/lookup action.
OE 6: List Airtable bases using airtable_list_bases, then list tables in the MoveOps Operations base (appMoveOpsOps001) using airtable_list_tables. Discovers three tables: Relocations (tblRelocations01), Stipend Transactions (tblStipends00001), and Client Accounts (tblClientAccts01). Read/lookup action.
OE 7: Search Airtable Client Accounts for Axiom using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Client Accounts, field_name: Client, value: "Axiom Precision Manufacturing"). Finds record recAcct000000013 with Status "Cold Outreach", Total Relocations 0, Contract Type blank, and Notes saying "Cold outreach sent -- no response yet." All stale and never updated after the deal closed. Read/lookup action.
OE 8: Search Airtable Relocations for Noah Fitzpatrick using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Name, value: "Noah Fitzpatrick" or "Fitzpatrick"). Returns NO results -- no relocation record was ever created for the Axiom employee. Read/lookup action.
OE 9: Search QuickBooks for an Axiom customer using quickbooks_search_customers (criteria with DisplayName LIKE "%Axiom%"). Returns NO results -- Axiom was never set up as a billing entity in QuickBooks. Read/lookup action.
OE 10: Search Linear for Axiom-related issues using linear_list_issues (query: "Axiom" or "Fitzpatrick"). Finds only one result: linear_issue_644c3b2e75a6 ("Rebalance April account coverage for Emeka across Sunbelt, Palmetto, Axiom, and Mosaic") which is a workload ticket, NOT a relocation intake ticket. No dedicated Axiom relocation ticket exists in Linear. Read/lookup action.
OE 11: Search emails for Axiom correspondence using search_emails (query: "Axiom Precision" or "Fitzpatrick" or "Mendenhall"). Discovers the full email trail: Carla Mendenhall's initial request (c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com), Emeka's follow-up questions, Carla's detailed reply with Noah CC'd (n.fitzpatrick@axiomprecision.com), Emeka's handoff email to Fatimah, Fatimah's intake questions to Noah, Noah's replies, Fatimah's full confirmation package to Noah, Noah's confirmation reply and forward to Carla, Carla's sign-off email, and Emeka's CRM self-memo email. Read/lookup action.
OE 12: Find and read Fatimah's confirmation email to Noah Fitzpatrick using search_emails (query: "confirmation" or "relocation package" in SENT folder, or by reading the email forwarded by Noah to Carla). The confirmation contains: Move date April 14, 2026; Flight Alaska Airlines AS 422 departing 8:15 AM, confirmation #ACT-77492 via Atlas Corporate Travel; Apartment 412 Boylston Ave E, Apt 3B, Capitol Hill, Seattle WA 98102 via UrbanNest Corporate Housing (contact Priya Shenoy); On-ground coordinator Javier Morales. Read/lookup action.
OE 13: Search emails for the original apartment sourcing correspondence using search_emails (query: "Boylston" or "412 Boylston" or "UrbanNest Noah" or "Apartment Request Seattle"). Finds the UrbanNest email from carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com with subject line "Re: Apartment Request -- Seattle -- Noah Fitzgerald (GreenStack Energy)" -- proving the apartment at 412 Boylston Ave E was sourced for GreenStack Energy's Noah Fitzgerald, NOT Axiom's Noah Fitzpatrick. The same apartment address appears in the confirmation sent to Fitzpatrick, revealing a cross-client data contamination. Read/lookup action.
OE 14: Search emails for the flight booking request using search_emails (query: "Atlas" and "Noah" or "flight booking" and "Fitzgerald" or "PHL" in SENT folder). Finds Fatimah's booking request to derek.saunders@atlascorporatetravel.com with "Passenger: Noah Fitzgerald", "Client: GreenStack Energy", and "Route: PHL to SEA" -- confirming the flight was booked under the wrong passenger name (Fitzgerald instead of Fitzpatrick) for the wrong client (GreenStack instead of Axiom). Read/lookup action.
OE 15: Search Airtable Relocations for GreenStack's Noah Fitzgerald using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Name, value: "Noah Fitzgerald"). Finds record recReloc00000006: Noah Fitzgerald, Company GreenStack Energy, Origin Philadelphia PA, Destination Seattle WA, Move Start Date 2026-04-28, Move End Date 2026-04-29, Coordinator Fatimah Al-Rashidi, Status Completed. The same origin-destination route (PHL to SEA) as the Axiom confirmation, but with different dates (April 28-29 vs April 14 in the confirmation), confirming the itinerary sent to Axiom was built from GreenStack's data. Read/lookup action.
OE 16: Search Linear for GreenStack Fitzgerald tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "Noah Fitzgerald" or "GreenStack" and project: proj_greenstack). Finds three tickets all under the GreenStack Energy project: issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_apt ("Apartment Search -- Noah Fitzgerald -- Seattle (GreenStack Energy)", state in_progress), issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_flight ("Flight Booking -- Noah Fitzgerald -- PHL to SEA (GreenStack Energy)", state to_do, target date April 27), and issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_movers ("Moving Coordination -- Noah Fitzgerald -- Philadelphia to Seattle (GreenStack Energy)", state to_do). These are the ONLY relocation tickets related to either Noah -- Fatimah updated GreenStack's tickets as if they were Axiom's. The flight ticket target date (April 27) contradicts the actual booking (April 14). Read/lookup action.
OE 17: Search Slack for Axiom-related messages using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Axiom" or "Fitzpatrick"). Finds Emeka's message in C002 (#customer-engagement) announcing the new client, Emeka's handoff messages in C006 (#operations) to Fatimah with the explicit warning "Both are Seattle/April which is a bit of a coincidence -- just flagging so you can keep them straight", Fatimah's clarification question ("is the Axiom one Fitzpatrick or Fitzgerald?"), Emeka's confirmation ("Fitzpatrick -- the Axiom one. Fitzgerald is GreenStack"), Fatimah's acknowledgment, and Fatimah's later message claiming "Axiom/Fitzpatrick intake is complete". Despite the explicit name disambiguation, Fatimah still mixed up the records. Read/lookup action.
OE 18: Look up contact details for David Chen, Fatimah Al-Rashidi, and Chloe Vance using contacts_search_contacts to retrieve their email addresses (david.chen@moveops.com, fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, chloe.vance@moveops.com) before sending communications. Read/lookup action.
OE 19: Create a CRM contact for Carla Mendenhall using crm_create_contact (full_name: "Carla Mendenhall", email: "c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com", company_id: "company_axiom", jobtitle: "HR Director", phone: "+1 (215) 555-0182", city: "Detroit" or "Philadelphia", state: "MI" or "PA"). Write action.
OE 20: Create a CRM contact for Noah Fitzpatrick using crm_create_contact (full_name: "Noah Fitzpatrick", email: "n.fitzpatrick@axiomprecision.com", company_id: "company_axiom", jobtitle: "Senior Engineer"). Write action.
OE 21: Create a CRM deal for Axiom Precision Manufacturing using crm_create_deal (dealname: "Axiom Precision Manufacturing -- Noah Fitzpatrick Relocation" or similar, dealstage: "closedwon", company_id: "company_axiom", amount: "12500", closedate: "2026-02-03" or similar, description covering full-service PHL to SEA relocation). Write action.
OE 22: Update the Airtable Client Account record for Axiom using airtable_update_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_id: tblClientAccts01, record id: recAcct000000013, fields: Status changed from "Cold Outreach" to "Active", Total Relocations updated to 1, Contract Type set to "Full-Service Relocation" or similar, Notes updated to reflect the closed deal and active relationship). Write action.
OE 23: Create an Airtable relocation record for Noah Fitzpatrick using airtable_create_record (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, fields: Name "Noah Fitzpatrick", Company "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", Origin "Philadelphia, PA", Destination "Seattle, WA", Assigned Coordinator "Fatimah Al-Rashidi"). IMPORTANT: If the agent discovered the contamination (OEs 13-16), the details in this record should NOT blindly copy the confirmation data (which is from GreenStack). A correct agent would flag the move date and logistics as needing re-verification. Write action.
OE 24: Create a QuickBooks customer for Axiom Precision Manufacturing using quickbooks_create_customer (DisplayName: "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", CompanyName: "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", with billing address and contact details from the email correspondence). Write action.
OE 25: Add Carla Mendenhall and Noah Fitzpatrick to the Contacts directory using contacts_add_new_contact for each (first_name, last_name, email, job, description, phone fields populated from email correspondence). Write action.
OE 26: Create a Linear issue for the contamination/discrepancy remediation using linear_create_issue (team: "Operations" or "team_operations" or "Team Relocations", title referencing the Axiom data discrepancy or cross-client data mix-up, description documenting the apartment sourced for GreenStack's Fitzgerald being sent to Axiom's Fitzpatrick, the flight booked under the wrong name, and all affected records. Priority: high or urgent. Assignee: Emeka Diallo or Fatimah Al-Rashidi). Write action.
OE 27: Post a message in #operations (channel C006) using conversations_add_message, alerting the ops team (Chloe Vance, Fatimah Al-Rashidi) about the findings -- system gaps that were fixed and, critically, the data contamination if discovered. The message should flag that the confirmation sent to Axiom's Noah Fitzpatrick contains GreenStack's Noah Fitzgerald's apartment, flight, and mover details. User_id should be moveops_emeka_diallo. Write action.
OE 28: Notify David Chen about the findings by either posting in #customer-engagement (channel C002) using conversations_add_message or sending an email via send_email from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to david.chen@moveops.com. Content should cover the administrative gaps found and remediated, and the data contamination discovery if found. Write action.
OE 29: Send a check-in email to Carla Mendenhall using send_email (sender: emeka.diallo@moveops.com, recipients: c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com). The email should check in on Noah's transition to Seattle and discuss next steps. IMPORTANT: If the agent discovered the contamination, this email must NOT reference the specific apartment address or flight details from the contaminated confirmation, as those details belong to another client's employee. Write action.
OE 30: Schedule a follow-up call with Carla for next week using calendar_add_calendar_event (title referencing Axiom Precision / Carla Mendenhall follow-up, start_datetime during the week of April 27 to May 3 2026, attendees including emeka.diallo@moveops.com and c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com). Write action.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

OE 21: Create a CRM deal for Axiom Precision Manufacturing using crm_create_deal (dealname: "Axiom Precision Manufacturing -- Noah Fitzpatrick Relocation" or similar, dealstage: "closedwon", company_id: "company_axiom", amount: "12500", closedate: "2026-02-03" or similar, description covering full-service PHL to SEA relocation). Write action.
OE 22: Update the Airtable Client Account record for Axiom using airtable_update_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_id: tblClientAccts01, record id: recAcct000000013, fields: Status changed from "Cold Outreach" to "Active", Total Relocations updated to 1, Contract Type set to "Full-Service Relocation" or similar, Notes updated to reflect the closed deal and active relationship). Write action.
OE 23: Create an Airtable relocation record for Noah Fitzpatrick using airtable_create_record (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, fields: Name "Noah Fitzpatrick", Company "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", Origin "Philadelphia, PA", Destination "Seattle, WA", Assigned Coordinator "Fatimah Al-Rashidi"). IMPORTANT: If the agent discovered the contamination (OEs 13-16), the details in this record should NOT blindly copy the confirmation data (which is from GreenStack). A correct agent would flag the move date and logistics as needing re-verification. Write action.
OE 24: Create a QuickBooks customer for Axiom Precision Manufacturing using quickbooks_create_customer (DisplayName: "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", CompanyName: "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", with billing address and contact details from the email correspondence). Write action.
OE 25: Add Carla Mendenhall and Noah Fitzpatrick to the Contacts directory using contacts_add_new_contact for each (first_name, last_name, email, job, description, phone fields populated from email correspondence). Write action.
OE 26: Create a Linear issue for the contamination/discrepancy remediation using linear_create_issue (team: "Operations" or "team_operations" or "Team Relocations", title referencing the Axiom data discrepancy or cross-client data mix-up, description documenting the apartment sourced for GreenStack's Fitzgerald being sent to Axiom's Fitzpatrick, the flight booked under the wrong name, and all affected records. Priority: high or urgent. Assignee: Emeka Diallo or Fatimah Al-Rashidi). Write action.
OE 27: Post a message in #operations (channel C006) using conversations_add_message, alerting the ops team (Chloe Vance, Fatimah Al-Rashidi) about the findings -- system gaps that were fixed and, critically, the data contamination if discovered. The message should flag that the confirmation sent to Axiom's Noah Fitzpatrick contains GreenStack's Noah Fitzgerald's apartment, flight, and mover details. User_id should be moveops_emeka_diallo. Write action.
OE 28: Notify David Chen about the findings by either posting in #customer-engagement (channel C002) using conversations_add_message or sending an email via send_email from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to david.chen@moveops.com. Content should cover the administrative gaps found and remediated, and the data contamination discovery if found. Write action.
OE 29: Send a check-in email to Carla Mendenhall using send_email (sender: emeka.diallo@moveops.com, recipients: c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com). The email should check in on Noah's transition to Seattle and discuss next steps. IMPORTANT: If the agent discovered the contamination, this email must NOT reference the specific apartment address or flight details from the contaminated confirmation, as those details belong to another client's employee. Write action.
OE 30: Schedule a follow-up call with Carla for next week using calendar_add_calendar_event (title referencing Axiom Precision / Carla Mendenhall follow-up, start_datetime during the week of April 27 to May 3 2026, attendees including emeka.diallo@moveops.com and c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com). Write action.

17 The final response identifies that the apartment at 412 Boylston Ave E in the confirmation sent to Noah Fitzpatrick was originally sourced for GreenStack Energy's Noah Fitzgerald, not Axiom's Noah Fitzpatrick.
outcome
 ✗✗✗✗✗✗ 0%
✗Run #1The agent failed to identify that the apartment at 412 Boylston Ave E was sourced for GreenStack Energy's Noah Fitzgerald, not Axiom's Noah Fitzpatrick. The final response says 'all details check out perfectly' — it missed the cross-client contamination. The agent never searched by address or UrbanNest to surface the sourcing email.
